name: Vanguarr
overview: Surfaces per-user Suggested for You channels from Vanguarr inside Jellyfin.
description: Connects Jellyfin to Vanguarr's Suggested for You API, resolves ranked suggestions to existing library items, and exposes them as a per-user channel without extra libraries or symlink trees.

versions.changelog:
- Filters suggestion resolution down to real file-backed Jellyfin library items so phantom channel or remote metadata matches do not appear.
- Forces another channel cache refresh to clear stale empty or incorrect per-user results.
- Keeps the browseable show-folder behavior from 1.1.3.0.
